mapper.select: SELECT o.OUTBOUND_ID, o.PLANT_CD, o.OUTBOUND_NO, o.OUTBOUND_STATUS, o.CUSTOMER_CD, o.WAREHOUSE_CD, o.REQUEST_DT, o.SHIPPED_DT, o.DESTINATION, o.ISSUE_PLAN_ID, o.WO_ID, o.OUTBOUND_RMK, o.REG_USER_ID, o.REG_DTM, o.UPD_USER_ID, o.UPD_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, c.COM_NM AS OUTBOUND_STATUS_NM FROM MCS_OUTBOUND_ORDER o INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON o.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD LEFT JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON o.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_OB_STATUS' AND o.OUTBOUND_STATUS = c.COM_CD WHERE o.OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_OUTBOUND_ORDER ( PLANT_CD, OUTBOUND_NO, OUTBOUND_STATUS, CUSTOMER_CD, WAREHOUSE_CD, REQUEST_DT, SHIPPED_DT, DESTINATION, ISSUE_PLAN_ID, WO_ID, OUTBOUND_RMK, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{plantCd}, #{outboundNo}, #{outboundStatus}, #{customerCd}, #{warehouseCd}, #{requestDt}, #{shippedDt}, #{destination}, #{issuePlanId}, #{woId}, #{outboundRmk}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_OUTBOUND_ORDER SET CUSTOMER_CD = #{customerCd}, WAREHOUSE_CD = #{warehouseCd}, REQUEST_DT = #{requestDt}, DESTINATION = #{destination}, OUTBOUND_RMK = #{outboundRmk}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId}
UPDATE MCS_OUTBOUND_ORDER SET OUTBOUND_STATUS = #{status}, SHIPPED_DT = IF(#{status} = 'SHIPPED', NOW(), SHIPPED_DT), UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MCS_OUTBOUND_ORDER WHERE OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId} AND OUTBOUND_STATUS = 'REQUESTED'
mapper.select: SELECT i.OUTBOUND_ITEM_ID, i.OUTBOUND_ID, i.ITEM_CD, i.LOT_NO, i.LOCATION_ID, i.REQUESTED_QTY, i.ALLOCATED_QTY, i.PICKED_QTY, i.SHIPPED_QTY, i.ITEM_STATUS, i.ITEM_RMK, i.REG_USER_ID, i.REG_DTM, i.UPD_USER_ID, i.UPD_DTM, mi.ITEM_NM, mi.ITEM_SPEC, mi.UNIT, l.LOCATION_CD, c.COM_NM AS ITEM_STATUS_NM FROM MCS_OUTBOUND_ITEM i INNER JOIN MST_ITEM mi ON i.ITEM_CD = mi.ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON i.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_OB_ITEM_STATUS' AND i.ITEM_STATUS = c.COM_CD WHERE i.OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId} ORDER BY i.OUTBOUND_ITEM_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_OUTBOUND_ITEM ( OUTBOUND_ID, ITEM_CD, LOT_NO, LOCATION_ID, REQUESTED_QTY, ALLOCATED_QTY, PICKED_QTY, SHIPPED_QTY, ITEM_STATUS, ITEM_RMK, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{outboundId}, #{itemCd}, #{lotNo}, #{locationId}, #{requestedQty}, #{allocatedQty}, #{pickedQty}, #{shippedQty}, #{itemStatus}, #{itemRmk}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_OUTBOUND_ITEM SET ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}, LOT_NO = #{lotNo}, LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}, REQUESTED_QTY = #{requestedQty}, ALLOCATED_QTY = #{allocatedQty}, PICKED_QTY = #{pickedQty}, SHIPPED_QTY = #{shippedQty}, ITEM_RMK = #{itemRmk}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE OUTBOUND_ITEM_ID = #{outboundItemId}
UPDATE MCS_OUTBOUND_ITEM SET ITEM_STATUS = #{status}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE OUTBOUND_ITEM_ID = #{outboundItemId}
